/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -fPIC -ftemplate-depth=256 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/doc_examples.dir/agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doc_examples.dir/kv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doc_examples.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../output/doc_examples  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/lee1y/Desktop/CloudDisk_v5/lib/ppconsul-0.2.3/out/output ../../output/libppconsul.0.1.dylib
